name: promptlibrary
description: SF AI Library: team prompts, skills, and context (markdown) with Google SSO, analytics, and Heroku deployment.

CORS_ORIGIN.description: Frontend origin allowed by API CORS, e.g. https://ail.mysalesforcedemo.com.

APP_BASE_URL.description: Canonical application base URL used for auth redirects, e.g. https://ail.mysalesforcedemo.com.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Long random secret used to sign session cookies.

GOOGLE_ALLOWED_DOMAIN.description: Restrict sign-in to a single domain, e.g. salesforce.com.

scripts.postdeploy: echo "Release phase runs Prisma migrations via Procfile release command."
